CERTIFICATION BY THE CENTRAL EXCISE OFFICE
1. Certified that duty has been paid by debit entry in the Personal
Ledger Account No _______________________ and / or CENVAT Account Debit
Entry Sr. No._____________ Dt. __________ or recorded as payable in
Daily Stock Account on the goods described overleaf.
Certified that the owner has entered into Bond No. &J_1IBOND-BONDNOEX&
under Rule 19 of Central Excise Rules, 2002 with the
accepted by the Assistant Commissioner / Deputy Commissioner of Central
2. Certified that I have opened and examined the Packages
No._______________________and found that the particulars stated and the
description of goods, given overleaf and the packing list (if any) are
correct and that all the packages have been stuffed in the container
same has been sealed with Central Excise Seal/One time Seal (OTS) No.
2. Certified that I have opened and examined the Packages No.
________________________ and found that the particulars stated and the
description of goods, given overleaf and the packing list (if any) are
correct and that all the packages have been stuffed in the container No.
same has beensealed with Central Excise Seal/One time Seal (OTS) No.
3. I have verified with the records, the exporter is only availing the
export incentives, as specified in box No. ___ and found it to be true.
4. Certified that I have drawn three representative samples from the
consignment (wherever necessary) and have handed over, two sets there of
duly sealed to the exporter/his authorised representative.
,, (Name in Block Letter),, (Name in Block Letter)
,, Superitendent of Central Excise,, Inspector of Central Excise
Certified that the consignment was shipped under my supervision under
S.S./Flight No._____________________ which left on the _____ day of
Certified that the above mentioned consignment was stuffed in Container
based on the "Let Export Order" given on ________ day of ____________
dated and sealed by seal / one time lock No.__________________ in my
supervision and the container was handed over to the Custodian M/s
Certified that the above-mentioned consignment has been duly identified
and has passed the land frontier today at __________________ in its
original condition under Bill of Exports No.___________________ .
Certified that the consignment described overleaf has been despatched by
Refund Order No.______________ dated _________ Rebate of Rs.____________

from whom rebate shall be claimed / with whom bond / undertaking is
executed and his complete postal address

TITHEAD will be printed depending on the flag setting.

from whom rebate shall be claimed and his complete postal address.
